summary: This document is a pitch deck for KOKU Health, an NHS-approved falls prevention platform designed for elderly care. It details the problem of falls in older adults, the digital exercise solution, clinical evidence, and the cost-benefit analysis for the NHS and local authorities. The deck concludes with a call to action for adoption and mentions upcoming data dashboard features.
